productDisplayName: Baggit Women Voodoo Viva Brown Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 19 cm x 9.5 cm Crafted from genuine leather with a fold over flap detail held in place by a concealed magnetic button One main compartment with zippered separator Four card holders and a pocket A zippered compartment on the flap and a zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
